kept.text:
SoFi Technologies $SOFI price target lowered to $29 from $38 at Mizuho

Mizuho analyst Dan Dolev lowered the firm's price target on SoFi Technologies to $29 from $38 and keeps an Outperform rating on the shares.

The firm updated the company's model post the Q1 report. 
Mizuho views the print as "solid," saying SoFi's member growth "remained robust." It reduced estimates for the company's 2026 and 2027.

kept.text:
Nightmare scenario
It's year 2040. SoFi stock is $24/share. $SOFI is still doing 10%/year share offerings, trying to build the Tech platform with global payment systems. Tech platform is growing 7%/year, and 2041 will be the transitional year. Management is heavily re-investing into the business. Shitty short firms releasing $17 price target😂🤣

Jokes aside, 
I'm all in $SOFI it's been a major loser for the last 6 months, though the management did all the right things, including the share offering at $27/share. Noto will deliver SHAREHOLDER RETURNS.
